title: cyperus virens var. arenicola
intro: Cyperus virens var. arenicola, also known as the sand sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, with its medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus virens var. arenicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
